Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Hears illusory whispers of 'Hornacis... Flegrea...' when near Antigonus-related locations
Klein Moretti.accessories: Silver pocket watch patterned with vine-leaves
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Text mentions him checking his silver pocket watch with vine-leaf patterns.

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: black hair that reached down her back
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times, old veiled hat
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned when she was looking at the new house.

Audrey Hall.hair_style: long blond hair coiled in an elegant bun
Audrey Hall.primary_clothing: collared, high-waisted, pale-white dress with engageantes, tight corset, voluminous cage crinoline; white-silk gloves; white dancing shoes with roses and diamonds.
Audrey Hall.face_description: delicate and youthful features, a soft jawline, and large expressive eyes
Audrey Hall.visual_anchor: late teens female, fair skin, long blonde hair, wearing a luxurious Victorian aristocratic dress, holding a cracked bronze mirror
Audrey Hall.distinguishing_features: Aura is pure and serene like a clear reflective lake; her chair above the fog displays a 'Giant Dragon' constellation symbol.
Audrey Hall.source_notes: Confirmed as a Beyonder by The Fool; aura and chair symbol described explicitly.

Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: Captain's uniform of the 'Blue Avenger', suited for sea travel.
Alger Wilson.face_description: Rough face with a stoic and solemn expression.
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: His chair above the fog displays a 'Storm' constellation symbol; his aura is noted as being much purer.
Alger Wilson.source_notes: The Fool observes the Storm symbol on his chair and the change in his aura purity.

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.distinguishing_features: Honorific title: 'The Fool that doesn’t belong to this era; The mysterious ruler above the gray fog; The King of Yellow and Black who wields good luck.'
The Fool.source_notes: Klein devises and recites this specific three-line incantation to direct rituals to himself.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Symbolizes the Red Moon.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Titles and red moon symbolism explicitly stated in the text.

Lady of Crimson.primary_clothing: Flowing dark red and silver Victorian-style divine robes, velvet textures
Lady of Crimson.face_description: Ethereal and detached face, almond-shaped crimson eyes, sharp but graceful features with high cheekbones.
Lady of Crimson.visual_anchor: Ethereal female figure with pale ivory skin, long flowing silver hair, and deep crimson eyes, wearing ornate dark red Victorian divine robes.
Lady of Crimson.distinguishing_features: Associated with the moon and ritualistic incantations
Lady of Crimson.source_notes: Mentioned as an entity to whom ritualistic chants are directed.

The Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth.name_english: The Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth for Blessings
The Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth.name_bengali: দ্য সেলেস্টিয়াল ওয়ার্থি অফ হেভেন অ্যান্ড আর্থ ফর ব্লেসিংস
The Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth.hair_style: long, tied back in ancient style
The Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth.primary_clothing: Ornate ancient mystical robes with complex yellow and black patterns, wide sleeves
The Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth.face_description: Majestic and inscrutable face, deep-set eyes that seem to hold stars, calm and serene expression of authority.
The Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth.visual_anchor: Ancient majestic figure in yellow and black ornate robes, deep black eyes, long black hair, radiating an aura of primordial authority.
The Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth.distinguishing_features: Original source of the luck-enhancement ritual chant
The Celestial Worthy of Heaven and Earth.source_notes: Mentioned as the origin of the ritual chant translated by Klein.
